task: Using only the embedded packet provided, analyze the GPU-hall liquid-cooling manifold imbalance. Compute per-rack flow-per-kW, identify thermal flags against limits, and produce a detailed balancing plan that does not exceed valve limits. Provide two deliverables: (1) liquid_cooling_balance.xlsx containing formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, and sensitivity checks around control thresholds; and (2) thermal_ops_memo.md describing the recommended actions, cost implications, uncertainty notes, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Allowed actions are limited to rebalance_valves, add_pump_speed_8pct (cost=12000), and throttle_R1_5pct. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
